task.summary: Evaluate owner-requested rollback of the latest Cloudflare Worker deployment so the lead notification branch remains GitHub-only for now.

model_or_worker.name: Codex GPT-5
model_or_worker.role: deployment rollback operator and governance updater

reasoning_profile.change_policy: Owner asked to keep the latest work only on GitHub to avoid unnecessary Cloudflare Free-plan usage. A Worker rollback was performed; product code stayed pushed on GitHub.

input_packet_summary.summary: Roll back the Cloudflare deployment of the lead notification branch while keeping commits on GitHub.

output_pointer.summary: Live Worker was rolled back to the previous version; GitHub branch codex/radeq-ab-c-preview still contains commit 731231b.

prompt_or_input_delta.summary: The owner changed deployment policy from live Cloudflare deploy to GitHub-only staging for the latest branch.
changed_fields: architecture note for active production versus GitHub branch
prompt_or_input_delta.rollback_path: Redeploy Radeq product commit 731231b or newer with the local production Wrangler configuration.

verification_evidence.evidence: wrangler rollback deployed Worker version 747d1ab3-ff49-497b-8cb8-917c67d0153d to 100% of traffic.
Public checks returned 200 for / and /ukazky/; OPTIONS /api/leads returned 204 with POST, OPTIONS.
Radeq and Autopilot git branches were clean before the rollback governance update; Radeq commit 731231b remained pushed to GitHub.
